title: Station at Dawn
subtitle: A quiet arrival
caption: Some mornings arrive like old letters, carrying a hush that only the heart can read.
quote: The station was never empty; it was only waiting.
fullPoem:
Some mornings arrive like old letters.
They carry a hush that only the heart can read.
The station is never truly empty.
It is full of departures that were never spoken aloud.
And each platform remembers the names of those who could not stay.
I walk slowly, as though the air itself is asking me to be still.
meaning: This poem is about the way grief and memory linger in ordinary places.
authorNotes: I wrote this after lingering at a train station at dawn, watching the city wake before the world had spoken.
inspiration: A delayed morning, a quiet platform, and the strange tenderness of departures.
seoDescription: A quiet poem about memory, departure, and the hush of morning.
altText: A soft cinematic scene of a platform at dawn.

title: The Paper Bridge
subtitle: A fragile promise
caption: What was once only a thought became a bridge made of patience and a little light.
quote: Hope can be quiet and still hold you.
fullPoem:
What was once only a thought
became a bridge made of patience and a little light.
It held no grand promise,
only the quiet courage to cross.
And when I stepped onto it,
I found that hope had always been a small and patient thing.
meaning: It is about building emotional stability from fragile belief.
authorNotes: This poem came from a period when I was learning to trust quiet progress.
inspiration: The idea of crossing into a new season without certainty.
seoDescription: A hopeful poem about crossing uncertainty with patience.
altText: A delicate bridge of paper and light in soft tones.

title: रातको छाया
subtitle: छाया र सम्झनाको बीच
caption: साँझको चुप्पीमा केही शब्दहरू अझै पनि डरका रूपमा फेर्नु भएको छ।
quote: रातले छाया बनायो, तर उज्यालो फिरि आएन।
fullPoem:
साँझको चुप्पीमा केही शब्दहरू अझै पनि डरका रूपमा फेर्नु भएको छ।
तिमीले जति समय फ्याँकिदियौ,
मेरो मनले त्यति नै गहिरो पातालमा झरेको छ।
रातले आफूलाई छाया बनाइरहे पनि,
माथिल्लो आकाशले अझै पनि एउटा थोरै उज्यालो बचाएको छ।
meaning: It explores loneliness and the way sorrow remains in the body long after the moment has passed.
authorNotes: This was written during a very still evening when silence felt heavier than sound.
inspiration: The presence of darkness after a difficult goodbye.
seoDescription: A reflective Nepali poem about grief, silence, and shadow.
altText: A dim evening scene with a soft melancholy atmosphere.

title: Unsaid Names
subtitle: What language leaves unnamed
caption: Sometimes the truest things arrive without permission and leave unchanged.
quote: Some truths arrive without a name.
fullPoem:
Sometimes the truest things arrive without permission.
They do not knock.
They simply enter the room and settle into the air.
We call them feelings, or questions, or long silences.
But perhaps they are only names we were never meant to speak aloud.
meaning: This poem considers the quiet, unspoken parts of human experience.
authorNotes: I wrote this when I wanted to stay with silence instead of forcing explanation.
inspiration: The beauty of things that cannot be named fully.
seoDescription: A contemplative poem about the unnamed feelings that shape us.
altText: An atmospheric portrait of silence and light.

title: A Small Fire
subtitle: Quiet devotion
caption: Love is not always a blaze. Sometimes it is a patient warmth held in the palm.
quote: A small fire can still keep the night company.
fullPoem:
Love is not always a blaze.
Sometimes it is a patient warmth held in the palm.
A small fire that needs no audience.
Only the kind of silence that allows it to continue.
meaning: It celebrates the quiet steadiness of care.
authorNotes: This one felt like a breath taken slowly after a long day.
seoDescription: A poem about love as quiet warmth and patient care.
altText: A warm, intimate flame in a quiet room.

title: भोलिको घाम
subtitle: आशा र दिन
caption: आकाशले आफ्नो थकान छुपाए पनि, दिनले फेरि आफ्नो रंग फर्काउने विश्वास छ।
quote: भोलिको घाम सधैं थोरै ढिलो आउँछ, तर आउँछ।
fullPoem:
आकाशले आफ्नो थकान छुपाए पनि,
दिनले फेरि आफ्नो रंग फर्काउने विश्वास छ।
हामीले धेरै कुरा हराएर पनि,
भोलिको घामलाई सजिलै बिर्सन सक्दैनौं।
कसैले भन्यो—आशा सधैं सानो हुन्छ,
तर त्यो सानो कुरा पनि जीवनलाई अगाडि लैजान सक्छ।
meaning: It is about hope returning even after exhaustion and loss.
authorNotes: I wrote this while watching the sky soften after a long, heavy day.
inspiration: The way sunlight can reappear after a clouded afternoon.
seoDescription: A hopeful Nepali poem about renewal and light.
altText: A bright and uplifting sunrise over quiet hills.
